top_signals.title: Postwar poet Chuya Nakahara’s complete works get a new life in English
top_signals.summary: A new translation, and the first publication of Chuya's complete works in English, aims to introduce the poet to readers abroad.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
